message: OBJ-13 provides a real operator scaffold. External Git fetch, durable history persistence and secured API delivery remain follow-up runtime steps.

rollback.workflow: Set spec.rollback.targetRevision and reconcile the controlled revert.
limitations: Durable change log backend is not implemented in this skeleton.
Rollback target validation is defined in artifacts but still needs runtime enforcement.

guardrails: No direct write path around the CRD.
Role-based access and policy reference are mandatory before enabling MCP.
All MCP writes must result in a normal reconcile and change-history event.
